---
title: "SMR summary"
author: "Darren Cameron"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
params:
  cell_types: null
  in_dir: null
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# Function to read and format SMR table
read_smr_table <- function(cell_type, in_dir) {
  file_path <- file.path(in_dir, cell_type, paste0(cell_type, "_scz.smr"))
  if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    readr::read_tsv(file_path, col_types = cols(.default = "c", 
                                               Probe_bp = "i", 
                                               topSNP_bp = "i", 
                                               Freq = "d", 
                                               b_GWAS = "d", 
                                               se_GWAS = "d", 
                                               p_GWAS = "d", 
                                               b_eQTL = "d", 
                                               se_eQTL = "d", 
                                               p_eQTL = "d", 
                                               b_SMR = "d", 
                                               se_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_SMR = "d", 
                                               p_HEIDI = "d", 
                                               nsnp_HEIDI = "i")) %>%
      arrange(p_SMR) %>%
      mutate(across(c(Freq, b_GWAS, se_GWAS, p_GWAS, b_eQTL, se_eQTL, p_eQTL, b_SMR, se_SMR, p_SMR, p_HEIDI), 
                    ~ format(.x, digits = 3, scientific = TRUE)))
  } else {
    message("File not found for cell type: ", cell_type)
    return(NULL)
  }
}
```

```{r plot_tables}
for (cell_type in params$cell_types) {
  cat("\n### ", cell_type, "\n")
  smr_data <- read_smr_table(cell_type, params$in_dir)
  if (!is.null(smr_data)) {
    smr_data %>%
      kable("html", caption = paste("SMR Results for", cell_type), 
            col.names = c("Probe ID", "Probe Chr", "Gene", "Probe BP", "Top SNP", 
                          "Top SNP Chr", "Top SNP BP", "A1", "A2", "Freq", 
                          "b GWAS", "se GWAS", "p GWAS", "b eQTL", "se eQTL", 
                          "p eQTL", "b SMR", "se SMR", "p SMR", "p HEIDI", "nSNP HEIDI")) %>%
      kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"), 
                    full_width = FALSE) %>%
      scroll_box(width = "100%", height = "500px") %>%
      print()
  } else {
    cat("No data available for ", cell_type, ".\n")
  }
}

```
